title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Daikin India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Daikin India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Daikin India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Daikin India:
Daikin India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
